title: Pause Both Tippers From The VISU_DATA Screen
summary: Use the PAUSE TIPPER control on the Operator Station HMI VISU_DATA screen to pause both tippers.
when_to_use: Use when an operator needs to pause both tippers from the VISU_DATA screen on the operator station HMI.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to pause AGVs; the packet includes separate AGV API controls in another source section.
Do not use this runbook for maintenance-only manual control, fault reset, or CellIO actions on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate to the VISU_DATA screen, locate the PAUSE TIPPER button, press it, and verify that both tippers are paused using available HMI status indications or system observation supported by the source.

safety_notes: Use only the documented PAUSE TIPPER control on the VISU_DATA screen.
The source does not describe a pause confirmation prompt or a detailed paused-state indicator in this section.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station HMI

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI
system_preconditions: VISU_DATA screen is available on the operator station HMI

visual_references.description: Operator Station HMI VISU_DATA screen showing login controls, message banner, and tipper statistics.
Operator station display controls showing how to navigate to the Visu_Data screen, including F5 mapping.
Additional VISU_DATA screen view showing operator statistics for left and right tippers.

steps.title: Open the VISU_DATA screen
steps.purpose: Access the HMI screen that contains the PAUSE TIPPER control.
steps.instruction: Open the VISU_DATA screen on the operator station HMI.
steps.expected_result: The VISU_DATA screen is displayed on the operator station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The VISU_DATA screen is visible and shows the expected data-screen elements such as the message banner, login/logout controls, and tipper statistics.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_DATA screen cannot be reached or the displayed screen does not match the documented VISU_DATA layout.

actions.label: Open VISU_DATA
actions.exact_action: Open the VISU_DATA screen on the operator station HMI.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_DATA screen layout including login controls, message banner, and tipper statistics.
Screen-navigation controls and the mapping showing F5 to Visu_Data.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the operator station HMI does not display the VISU_DATA screen.
Stop or escalate if the screen navigation controls do not allow access to Visu_Data.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The listed control mapping includes F5 to "Visu_Data."

Figure 4-20 and Table 4-6 describe the Operator Station HMI Data Screen, including the informational banner, logged-in user ID, LOGIN/LOGOUT buttons, Tipper Stats, Process Status, RunTime Meters, screen selection drop-down, hospital send buttons, and PAUSE TIPPER.

steps.title: Locate the PAUSE TIPPER button
steps.purpose: Identify the documented control used to pause both tippers.
steps.instruction: Locate the PAUSE TIPPER button on the VISU_DATA screen.
steps.expected_result: The PAUSE TIPPER button is identified on the VISU_DATA screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The PAUSE TIPPER control is visible on the VISU_DATA screen.
steps.failure_condition: The PAUSE TIPPER button is not visible or cannot be identified on the VISU_DATA screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The VISU_DATA screen area containing the PAUSE TIPPER control.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the PAUSE TIPPER button is not present on the VISU_DATA screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 4-20 and Table 4-6 describe the Operator Station HMI Data Screen, including ... PAUSE TIPPER.
Table 4-6 continues with Process Status, RunTime Meters, direct screen selection, SEND LEFT TO HOSPITAL, SEND RIGHT TO HOSPITAL, and PAUSE TIPPER.

steps.title: Press the PAUSE TIPPER button
steps.purpose: Issue the documented pause action for both tippers.
steps.instruction: Press the PAUSE TIPPER button on the VISU_DATA screen.
steps.expected_result: The pause command is issued for both tippers.
steps.healthy_condition: The documented PAUSE TIPPER control has been pressed from the VISU_DATA screen.
steps.failure_condition: Pressing the PAUSE TIPPER button does not pause both tippers.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The VISU_DATA screen where the PAUSE TIPPER button is located.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if pressing PAUSE TIPPER does not pause both tippers.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The PAUSE TIPPER button will pause both tippers.

steps.title: Verify both tippers are paused
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented pause action took effect.
steps.instruction: Verify that both tippers are paused using available HMI status indications or system observation supported by the source.
steps.healthy_condition: Available HMI status indications or direct system observation are consistent with both tippers being paused.
steps.failure_condition: Available HMI status indications or direct system observation do not show both tippers paused, or the paused state cannot be confirmed from the available source-supported indicators.

actions.label: Check paused state
actions.exact_action: Verify that both tippers are paused using available HMI status indications or system observation supported by the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Available VISU_DATA screen status areas such as process/status regions and other visible indicators that may support confirmation.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if pressing PAUSE TIPPER does not pause both tippers.
Stop or escalate if the paused state cannot be confirmed because the source does not define a detailed paused-state indicator in this section.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The PAUSE TIPPER button will pause both tippers.
The VISU_DATA screen presents process status indicators and related operating information.

success_criteria: The VISU_DATA screen is opened on the operator station HMI.
The PAUSE TIPPER button is located and pressed.
healthy_conditions: The operator can access the VISU_DATA screen.
The PAUSE TIPPER button is present on the VISU_DATA screen.
Both tippers are paused after the button is pressed.
failure_conditions: The VISU_DATA screen cannot be accessed.
The PAUSE TIPPER button cannot be located on the VISU_DATA screen.
Pressing PAUSE TIPPER does not pause both tippers.
The source section does not define a detailed paused-state confirmation indicator.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if pressing PAUSE TIPPER does not pause both tippers.
Escalate if the paused state cannot be confirmed from the available source-supported HMI indications or system observation.
